title: EPIC: Live Kanban Board & Agent Visualization
description: Build the real-time Kanban board that displays project progress and the Morty agent columns that show what each sub-agent is doing. This is what makes Rick Terminal special - you can actually SEE the multiverse of productivity happening.
acceptance_criteria: Kanban board renders with draggable cards
Agent columns dynamically appear/disappear based on active agents
Visual indicators for task status changes
